visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair wearing a lime green sweatshirt yells at the camera in a room. He holds a black foam rod and appears to be scolding staff. Two women and a man stand in the background with neutral expressions. (2) The man in the green sweatshirt points the rod at a younger man in a white sweatshirt holding a potted plant. The camera cuts between the creator's yelling face and the employee's confused expression. (3) The creator pulls a grey skincare tube out from behind the employee's head and presents it directly to the lens. (4) Close-up shots of skincare products on a white surface, including a grey cleanser tube, a clear bottle of toner, and two mint-green pump bottles. (5) The young man is shown in a bathroom setting, applying white foam cleanser to his face and rinsing it off at a sink. (6) Back in the main room, the creator and the employee talk and laugh together while holding the skincare products. (7) A final promotional sequence shows the creator pointing at text overlays containing a discount code and group-buy information.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 散! 漫!. [Logo]: @HanHan. (2) [Subtitle]: 我說你們這些. (3) [Subtitle]: 大頭佛工作室的一些員工. (4) [Subtitle]: 越來越散漫了!哈. (5) [Subtitle]: 通通都有 給我報數. (6) [Variety]: 1 2. [Variety]: 周耶嫩:?. (7) [Subtitle]: 報數 男生給我留下. (8) [Subtitle]: 你知道 你負責的企劃 為什麼點閱那麼差嗎. (9) [Variety]: 道具做不好 影響點閱率嗎. [Variety]: 你在臭我嗎?. (10) [Variety]: 是! 因! 為!. [Subtitle]: 你沒有使用杉杏保養品 來保養你的皮膚啦!. (11) [Subtitle]: 你平常就應該使用這個 清潔呼吸潔顏霜. [Subtitle]: 它可以 深度清潔毛孔 而且保濕不乾澀. (12) [Subtitle]: 洗完臉之後 再用這個 靜潤涵水平衡露. [Subtitle]: 可以 穩定膚況 讓肌膚回到細緻狀態. (13) [Subtitle]: 最後再搭配 無瑕煥肌精華 跟 無瑕煥肌乳霜. (14) [Subtitle]: 這是專為 亞熱帶氣候設計的 粉刺痘痘肌膚用的保養品. (15) [Subtitle]: 老闆那請問乾性... [Subtitle]: 乾性喔 乾性也OK 油性也OK. (16) [Variety]: 周姓 蔡姓. [Subtitle]: 老闆這個也很無聊 這一支不會破十萬啦. [Subtitle]: 關你屁事喔. (17) [Subtitle]: 杉杏保養品是全膚質適用. (18) [Subtitle]: 成分單純而且不添加香精 香料跟色素. (19) [Subtitle]: 而且他們家還是結合 醫美診所跟SPA店 及專業研發自有保養品的 專家品牌. (20) [Subtitle]: 老闆那我可以跟你 借回家用用看嗎. [Subtitle]: 不用借 你就跟那個窗口 多要幾個公關品 寄到你家就好. (21) [Variety]: 臉皮沒那麼厚. [Subtitle]: 你在那邊學不回 臉皮沒那麼厚 那就自己買啦. (22) [Variety]: 嘎哥優惠團購中. [Subtitle]: 到嘎哥的IG首頁 連結點起來. (23) [Variety]: 嘎哥專屬折扣碼. [Variety]: yga0721. [Subtitle]: 享有賣場訂單 不限金額免運費.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, 1 featured employee, and 2 background assistants.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in a lime green sweatshirt with brown hair; a younger man in a white sweatshirt with a silver chain.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist indoor room with a gray sofa and wooden cabinet; a bright, clean bathroom with a white ceramic sink and large mirror.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A loud, energetic male voice dominates the mix, scolding others with a comedic tone. High-pitched synthesizer music plays in the background. A sharp 'pop' sound effect accompanies a scene transition. (2) The vocal tone shifts to mock interrogation. Low-frequency thuds and percussive hits occur as items are pointed at. The BGM remains consistent and upbeat. (3) A 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition to a more persuasive, descriptive vocal delivery as a product is introduced. The speaker's articulation becomes more precise. (4) Auditory cues of running water and the soft 'click' of a plastic tube being opened are heard during the face-washing demonstration. (5) Banter between two male voices increases in speed. Faint laughter from others in the background adds to the room atmosphere. (6) The video concludes with a fast-paced, high-arousal delivery of a promotional call to action, accompanied by a final musical stinger.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Comedic Skit -> Product Transition -> Tutorial -> Final CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the FIRICOT skincare brand through a high-energy comedic skit and product demonstration, encouraging viewers to use a specific discount code.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, verbal brand mentions, and a dedicated group-buy discount code provided at the end.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Classic influencer marketing layout: uses a studio-based skit to retain audience interest before pivoting into a formal ad.
